race.comment: STORM CAPITAL (9) broke the maiden status over this track and trip last time out and will have derived a stack of confidence from that victory. Gets 2kg off with the claim and maps nicely for this from gate three. Plenty to like about his prospects. LOWLANDS (7) doesn't win out of turn but has remarkably hit the top-five in 11 of her past 12 starts and doesn't know how to put in a poor one. Has to be included in calculations. CIFONELLI (3) is a former NSW galloper having his first run for the new stable and any market confidence must be noted. THAT'S IT (8) resumes here but has a handy first-up record and can run a big race while fresh. TALONS (4) best of the rest.
